BLDC Motor Control
  • Control Module
  • src.control.svm_generator
  • View page source

src.control.svm_generator

SVM Generator Module

This module implements Space Vector Modulation (SVM) for 3-phase voltage generation and includes an optional stateful inverter-realism layer.

The realism layer is deliberately lightweight compared to a switching-device transient simulator, but it captures the most important inverter effects used in drive-system studies:

  • Constant semiconductor conduction drop

  • Current-dependent conduction loss

  • Switching-frequency-dependent voltage loss

  • Direction-aware dead-time distortion

  • Freewheel diode path loss

  • Minimum pulse suppression near zero voltage

  • DC-link capacitor/ESR/source-resistance dynamics

  • Junction-temperature-dependent parameter drift

  • Per-phase asymmetry and mismatch

Each realism feature can be enabled or disabled independently so the simulator can be tuned from ideal-average behavior up to a more realistic reduced-order inverter model.

Classes

CartesianSVMGenerator([dc_voltage, ...])

Extended SVM generator accepting Cartesian alpha-beta voltages.

InverterRealismConfig([enable_device_drop, ...])

Configuration container for all switchable inverter-realism blocks.

SVMGenerator([dc_voltage, device_drop_v, ...])

Space Vector Modulation Generator.
class src.control.svm_generator.InverterRealismConfig(enable_device_drop=False, device_drop_v=0.0, enable_dead_time=False, dead_time_fraction=0.0, enable_conduction_drop=False, conduction_resistance_ohm=0.0, enable_switching_loss=False, switching_frequency_hz=0.0, switching_loss_coeff_v_per_a_khz=0.0, enable_diode_freewheel=False, diode_drop_v=0.0, diode_resistance_ohm=0.0, enable_min_pulse=False, min_pulse_fraction=0.0, enable_bus_ripple=False, dc_link_capacitance_f=0.0, dc_link_source_resistance_ohm=0.0, dc_link_esr_ohm=0.0, enable_thermal_coupling=False, thermal_resistance_k_per_w=0.0, thermal_capacitance_j_per_k=1.0, ambient_temperature_c=25.0, temp_coeff_resistance_per_c=0.0, temp_coeff_drop_per_c=0.0, enable_phase_asymmetry=False, phase_voltage_scale_a=1.0, phase_voltage_scale_b=1.0, phase_voltage_scale_c=1.0, phase_drop_scale_a=1.0, phase_drop_scale_b=1.0, phase_drop_scale_c=1.0)[source]

Bases: object

Configuration container for all switchable inverter-realism blocks.

phase_voltage_scale_b: float = 1.0
phase_voltage_scale_c: float = 1.0

__init__(enable_device_drop=False, device_drop_v=0.0, enable_dead_time=False, dead_time_fraction=0.0, enable_conduction_drop=False, conduction_resistance_ohm=0.0, enable_switching_loss=False, switching_frequency_hz=0.0, switching_loss_coeff_v_per_a_khz=0.0, enable_diode_freewheel=False, diode_drop_v=0.0, diode_resistance_ohm=0.0, enable_min_pulse=False, min_pulse_fraction=0.0, enable_bus_ripple=False, dc_link_capacitance_f=0.0, dc_link_source_resistance_ohm=0.0, dc_link_esr_ohm=0.0, enable_thermal_coupling=False, thermal_resistance_k_per_w=0.0, thermal_capacitance_j_per_k=1.0, ambient_temperature_c=25.0, temp_coeff_resistance_per_c=0.0, temp_coeff_drop_per_c=0.0, enable_phase_asymmetry=False, phase_voltage_scale_a=1.0, phase_voltage_scale_b=1.0, phase_voltage_scale_c=1.0, phase_drop_scale_a=1.0, phase_drop_scale_b=1.0, phase_drop_scale_c=1.0)
class src.control.svm_generator.SVMGenerator(dc_voltage=48.0, device_drop_v=0.0, dead_time_fraction=0.0, conduction_resistance_ohm=0.0, switching_frequency_hz=0.0, switching_loss_coeff_v_per_a_khz=0.0)[source]

Bases: object

Space Vector Modulation Generator.

The core SVM implementation remains an averaged inverter model. Realism is layered on top of that average model so users can independently enable or disable each effect.

__init__(dc_voltage=48.0, device_drop_v=0.0, dead_time_fraction=0.0, conduction_resistance_ohm=0.0, switching_frequency_hz=0.0, switching_loss_coeff_v_per_a_khz=0.0)[source]
set_sample_time(sample_time_s)[source]

Set simulation step used by bus and thermal state updates.

Return type:

None

reset_realism_state()[source]

Reset capacitor voltage, temperature, and cached telemetry.

Return type:

None

modulate(magnitude, angle)[source]

Generate 3-phase SVM voltages and apply enabled realism blocks.

Return type:

ndarray

get_maximum_voltage()[source]

Return presently available linear-range SVM voltage magnitude.

Return type:

float

property device_drop_v: float

Backward-compatible access to configured device drop.

property dead_time_fraction: float

Backward-compatible access to configured dead-time fraction.

property conduction_resistance_ohm: float

Backward-compatible access to conduction resistance.

property switching_frequency_hz: float

Backward-compatible access to switching frequency.

property switching_loss_coeff_v_per_a_khz: float

Backward-compatible access to switching-loss coefficient.

set_nonidealities(device_drop_v=0.0, dead_time_fraction=0.0, conduction_resistance_ohm=0.0, switching_frequency_hz=0.0, switching_loss_coeff_v_per_a_khz=0.0, enable_device_drop=None, enable_dead_time=None, enable_conduction_drop=None, enable_switching_loss=None, enable_diode_freewheel=False, diode_drop_v=0.0, diode_resistance_ohm=0.0, enable_min_pulse=False, min_pulse_fraction=0.0, enable_bus_ripple=False, dc_link_capacitance_f=0.0, dc_link_source_resistance_ohm=0.0, dc_link_esr_ohm=0.0, enable_thermal_coupling=False, thermal_resistance_k_per_w=0.0, thermal_capacitance_j_per_k=1.0, ambient_temperature_c=25.0, temp_coeff_resistance_per_c=0.0, temp_coeff_drop_per_c=0.0, enable_phase_asymmetry=False, phase_voltage_scale_a=1.0, phase_voltage_scale_b=1.0, phase_voltage_scale_c=1.0, phase_drop_scale_a=1.0, phase_drop_scale_b=1.0, phase_drop_scale_c=1.0)[source]

Configure inverter-realism parameters and explicit feature toggles.

Return type:

None

set_phase_currents(phase_currents)[source]

Provide phase currents used by current-dependent inverter effects.

Return type:

None

get_last_telemetry()[source]

Return telemetry from the last modulation step.

Return type:

Dict[str, float | int | bool]

get_realism_state()[source]

Return the complete inverter configuration and runtime state.

Return type:

Dict[str, Any]

set_dc_voltage(dc_voltage)[source]

Update the source DC bus value seen by the inverter model.

Return type:

None

Bases: SVMGenerator

Extended SVM generator accepting Cartesian alpha-beta voltages.

Generate SVM voltages from Cartesian alpha-beta coordinates.

Return type:

ndarray
